signals.headline: House Democrats File Impeachment Articles Against Defense Secretary Hegseth | CONFIRMED (April 16) | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
House Democrats File Impeachment Articles Against Defense Secretary Hegseth | CONFIRMED (April 16) | HIGH confidence**

Six articles of impeachment against Pete Hegseth were filed by House Democrats, accusing him of unauthorized Iran war operations and mishandling classified information.[3] However, the measure has virtually no chance of passing given Republican congressional control.[3]

signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in prior months but below 2.4% forecasts | NO | HIGH confidence**[1]

signals.headline: Senate Rejects War Powers Resolution on Iran | CONFIRMED (April 16) | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Senate Rejects War Powers Resolution on Iran | CONFIRMED (April 16) | HIGH confidence**

The Senate narrowly rejected Bernie Sanders's resolution to limit Trump's ability to wage war against Iran in a 47–52 vote, with all Senate Republicans except Rand Paul opposing it.[3] This reflects deepening Republican-White House unity on foreign policy despite Democratic opposition.[3]

signals.headline: Alpenglow Consensus Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98
signals.raw:
Alpenglow Consensus Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98.27% Approval | YES | HIGH confidence**[4]

Solana's Alpenglow upgrade, targeting transaction finality reduction to 100-150 milliseconds, secured overwhelming community support, positioning it as a major performance catalyst amid record 167 million monthly token holders and 148 million daily non-vote transactions as of April 14, 2026[1][4].
